home_heroSubtitle: Say goodbye to tedious manual masking. Our advanced AI isolates subjects in under 5 seconds with pixel-perfect precision.
home_demoSubtitle: Drag the slider to see how the background is cleanly removed while preserving intricate details and textures.
home_featuresSubtitle: Built for speed, accuracy, and professional workflows.
home_feature1Desc: Advanced machine learning models identify complex edges, hairs, and fine details, delivering studio-quality cutouts automatically.
home_feature2Desc: Get results in under 5 seconds. Process files instantly on our high-performance GPU cloud servers and download them immediately.
home_feature3Desc: Supports exporting images at original resolutions up to 4K. Download clean transparent PNG files ready for editing or publication.
guide_subtitle: Learn how to remove backgrounds from your photos in seconds using intelligent AI tools. Follow these simple steps to master the platform.
guide_steps_0_description: Drag and drop your image file into the upload zone or click to browse your device. We support popular formats like PNG, JPEG, and WebP.
guide_steps_1_description: Click the 'Remove Background' button. Our advanced AI will analyze the subject and cleanly separate it from the background with high precision in seconds.
guide_steps_2_description: Use the interactive Before & After slider — drag left to right to inspect the quality of the cutout down to the finest details.
guide_steps_3_description: Save your new image as a transparent PNG in high definition, perfect for graphic design, e-commerce, or social media use.
guide_tip1: Choose photos where the foreground subject is well defined and doesn't visually blend into the background.
guide_tip2: Images with strong lighting or color contrast between background and subject help the AI make a perfect cutout.
guide_tip3: All your processed files are securely saved in your Projects section so you can download or review them anytime.
uploader_popoverSubtitle: Upload any image to start background removal instantly.
uploader_dragLabel: Drag files here or click to browse
uploader_dragDescription: Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 10 MB.
projects_noUploadsDesc: Upload an image above to start removing backgrounds!
auth_loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
auth_signUpDescription: Enter your email below to create your new account
auth_resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive a recovery link.
auth_checkEmailDesc: We've sent you a link to reset your password.
auth_errorReset: Error requesting password reset. Try again.
projects_deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone and the image will be permanently deleted.
